data.name: Circuit breaker has temporarily blocked this backend due to repeated failures. No requests are routed here until the ban expires. Use "Test Connection" on the Provider edit page to manually revive.
data.value: The circuit breaker has temporarily blocked this backend due to repeated failures. No requests are routed here until the ban expires. Use "Test Connection" on the Provider edit page to manually revive it.

data.name: Manage virtual models that proxy to underlying Ollama models
data.value: Manage virtual models that proxy to underlying Ollama models

data.name: Model exists on the provider, but is not currently loaded in memory. Requests ARE routed here — Ollama will automatically load the model on demand (cold start, may take seconds to minutes).
data.value: The model exists on the provider but is not currently loaded into memory. Requests ARE routed here — Ollama will automatically load the model on demand (cold start, which may take seconds to minutes).

data.name: Model is loaded in GPU VRAM. Requests are routed to this backend and respond instantly.
data.value: The model is loaded into GPU VRAM. Requests are routed to this backend and respond instantly.

data.name: Model not found on the provider. Requests are NOT routed here. Check that the underlying model name is correct and exists on the provider.
data.value: Model not found on the provider. Requests are NOT routed here. Check that the underlying model name is correct and exists on the provider.
